Title: Introduce Task as First-Class Entity
Description: System introduces a Task object as the primary unit of work, replacing chat-centric flow.
Acceptance Criteria: Tasks can be created, updated, assigned; all agent activity is linked to a task; tasks persist history and state.

Title: Implement Decision Log for Tasks
Description: Record all significant decisions made during task execution in an immutable log.
Acceptance Criteria: Each task has decision history; decisions include author, timestamp, rationale; decisions are retrievable and auditable.

Title: Separate Conversation Layer from Task Layer
Description: Decouple chat/messages from task execution so conversations are views of tasks rather than the system state.
Acceptance Criteria: Messages can be linked to tasks; tasks remain source of truth; conversations can be filtered by task/team/agent.

Title: Implement Agent PTY Execution Environment
Description: Each agent runs in a PTY allowing command execution and live output streaming.
Acceptance Criteria: Agents can execute commands; PTY output is viewable in UI; user can interact with PTY directly.

Title: Add Remote Mobile Access via Secure QR Pairing
Description: Enable secure remote access to system via QR code session pairing.
Acceptance Criteria: QR generates session token; phone can connect to session; access is authenticated and time-limited.

Title: Implement Team Hierarchy with Leads
Description: Introduce Team Lead agents responsible for coordinating sub-agents.
Acceptance Criteria: Leads can assign tasks to agents; leads summarise progress; leads can be joined or overridden by user.

Title: Enable Human 'Join Team' Mode
Description: Allow user to join any team context and observe or interact in real time.
Acceptance Criteria: User can switch team context; view agent interactions; intervene in conversations or PTYs.

Title: Implement Agent Mentions and Targeted Messaging
Description: Support @agent mentions to direct messages or assign tasks explicitly.
Acceptance Criteria: @agent triggers direct routing; FYI messages do not trigger execution; agents distinguish addressed vs mentioned.

Title: Add Agent Exclusion and Inclusion Controls
Description: Allow user to include/exclude agents from tasks or discussions dynamically.
Acceptance Criteria: Excluded agents do not receive messages; included agents are scoped per task or team.

Title: Implement Task-Based Work Assignment System
Description: All work is structured as tasks assigned to agents or teams.
Acceptance Criteria: Tasks can be assigned, reassigned, tracked; tasks have lifecycle states.

Title: Enable Multi-Agent Collaboration per Task
Description: Agents collaborate within task context rather than global chat.
Acceptance Criteria: Agents see task context; collaboration is scoped; task state updates in real time.

Title: Implement Live Agent Status Dashboard
Description: Provide real-time visibility of agent activity and status.
Acceptance Criteria: Each agent shows current task, status, PTY state; updates reflect live execution.

Title: Enable Model Switching Per Agent
Description: Allow changing underlying model for each agent dynamically.
Acceptance Criteria: Model can be swapped mid-task; changes do not break context; execution continues.

Title: Implement Task History Replay
Description: Allow replaying full task execution including messages and PTY output.
Acceptance Criteria: User can replay task timeline; includes decisions, messages, and execution logs.

Title: Add Conflict Resolution Between Agents
Description: System handles disagreement between agents via hierarchy or voting.
Acceptance Criteria: Conflicts detected; resolved via lead, vote, or user intervention.

Title: Implement Agent Memory Scoped to Tasks
Description: Agents maintain memory tied to tasks rather than global state.
Acceptance Criteria: Memory persists per task; agents recall prior decisions within task scope.

Title: Enable Task Branching and Experimentation
Description: Allow tasks to fork into alternative implementation paths.
Acceptance Criteria: Tasks can be cloned/branched; branches can be compared or merged.

Title: Implement Real-Time PTY Streaming to UI
Description: Stream PTY output live to web and mobile UI.
Acceptance Criteria: PTY output updates in real time; user can view per-agent terminal stream.

Title: Add Manual Intervention Controls for Execution
Description: User can pause, approve, or modify agent execution live.
Acceptance Criteria: User can stop execution; approve commands; inject instructions.

Title: Introduce Event-Driven Agent Triggers
Description: Agents respond to system events rather than only chat messages.
Acceptance Criteria: Events include task updates, file changes, assignments; agents react accordingly.

Title: Implement Persistent Organizational Decisions Store
Description: Store global and task-level decisions for future agent reference.
Acceptance Criteria: Agents can query decision history; decisions persist across sessions.

Title: Enable Multi-Team Structure with Leads
Description: Support multiple teams with hierarchical leads managing sub-agents.
Acceptance Criteria: Teams isolated; leads coordinate agents; user can switch/join teams.

Title: Implement Mobile Mission Control Interface
Description: Provide mobile UI for managing tasks, agents, and PTYs.
Acceptance Criteria: User can view tasks, agents, PTYs; intervene remotely; approve actions.

Title: Add Task-Centric System of Record
Description: Make tasks the system of record instead of chat sessions.
Acceptance Criteria: All activity attaches to tasks; sessions are views; tasks persist state.
